nav.logoutConfirmDesc: You are about to sign out of your account. Do you want to continue?

index.heroDesc: SparkLab transforms complex electronics concepts into interactive experiences with missions and competitions.
index.virtualLabDesc: Build circuits by dragging components onto an interactive canvas.
index.gamificationDesc: Earn XP, level up, and unlock achievements while learning.
index.guidedMissionsDesc: Learn step by step with progressive challenges and feedback.
index.globalLeaderboardDesc: Compete with other students and climb the rankings.
index.ctaDesc: Create your free account and start building circuits today.
index.footerShortDesc: Learn electronics through interactive experiences, missions, and competitions.

auth.invalidCredentials: Invalid credentials. If you created your account with Google, use the "Google" button to sign in, or reset your password.
auth.verifyEmailFirst: Please verify your email address before signing in.

auth.googleError: Error connecting with Google. Please try again.
auth.googleConflict: There was a conflict with your account. Try signing in with email and password.

dashboard.continueAdventure: Continue your adventure in the world of electrical circuits.
dashboard.mission1Desc: Connect a battery to an LED
dashboard.profileIncompleteDesc: You have pending data to add to your profile (username, language, gender or country).

forgotPassword.title: Recover Password
forgotPassword.desc: Enter your email and we'll send you a recovery link.
forgotPassword.checkEmailDesc: If the email {{email}} exists in our system, you will receive a recovery link in a few minutes.
forgotPassword.checkSpam: Also check your spam or junk folder.

resetPassword.desc: Enter and confirm your new password.
resetPassword.success: Password updated. Please sign in with your new credentials.
resetPassword.securityError: Password does not meet all security requirements.
resetPassword.invalidLinkDesc: This recovery link is no longer valid or has expired. Request a new one to reset your password.

verification.title: Verify your email
verification.sentTo: We sent a verification link to
verification.checkInbox: Check your inbox (and spam folder) to activate your account.

accountActivated.title: Account Activated!
accountActivated.desc: Your email has been successfully verified. You can now sign in with your credentials.

security.title: Security
security.requirementsNotMet: Password does not meet all requirements.
security.updateSuccess: Password changed. Your session will be closed so you can sign in with your new password.
security.googleMessage: Your account is linked to Google. Your access security is managed by your email provider.
security.googleSetPassword: Want to create a password to sign in manually in the future?
security.resetEmailSent: A link has been sent to your email to set a password.

terms.title: Terms and Conditions
terms.intro: Welcome to SparkLab. By accessing and using our platform, you agree to these Terms and Conditions. Please read them carefully before using our services.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By registering or using SparkLab you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, you must not use the platform.

sections.title: Service Description
sections.content: SparkLab is a gamified educational platform to learn electrical circuits through interactive simulations, missions, and competitions. The content is for educational purposes.

sections.title: User Account
sections.content: You are responsible for keeping your password confidential and for any activity under your account. You must provide accurate information when registering.

sections.title: Acceptable Use
sections.content: You must not use SparkLab for illegal purposes, infringe third-party rights, distribute malware, or attempt unauthorized access to systems related to the platform.

sections.title: Intellectual Property
sections.content: All content (text, graphics, code, marks) belongs to SparkLab or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce it without permission.

sections.title: User Content
sections.content: You keep ownership of the content you create, but grant us a license to display it within the platform for educational and service operation purposes.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: SparkLab is provided "as is". We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability or an error-free service. We are not liable for indirect damages arising from its use.

sections.title: Service Modifications
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue features of the platform at any time, notifying changes when possible.

sections.title: Changes to the Terms
sections.content: We may update these terms. Changes take effect when published on this page. Continued use implies acceptance of the new terms.

sections.title: Contact
sections.content: If you have questions about these terms, contact us at kdbermudezr@ufpso.edu.co.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Your privacy matters to SparkLab. This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the rights you have over it.

sections.title: Information We Collect
sections.content: We collect data you provide (name, email, username, language, gender, country) and data generated by your use of the platform (progress, XP, completed missions).

sections.title: Use of Information
sections.content: We use your data to authenticate you, personalize your experience, display your progress and ranking position, and improve the platform.

sections.title: Legal Basis
sections.content: We process your data based on the performance of the service you requested upon registration and your consent, which you may withdraw at any time.

sections.title: Data Sharing
sections.content: We do not sell your data. We only share it with providers that help us run the service (authentication, database, email) under confidentiality agreements.

sections.title: Cookies and Similar Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies and local storage to keep your session and remember accessibility and language preferences. You may clear them from your browser.

sections.title: Security
sections.content: We apply reasonable technical and organizational measures (encryption in transit, RLS in the database, password hashing) to protect your information.

sections.title: Data Retention
sections.content: We keep your data while your account is active or as needed to provide the service. You may request its deletion by contacting us.

sections.title: Your Rights
sections.content: You have the right to access, rectify, delete, and port your data, as well as to object to its processing. To exercise them, write to kdbermudezr@ufpso.edu.co.

sections.title: Minors
sections.content: If you are a minor, you must have your parent or legal guardian's consent to use SparkLab.

sections.title: Changes to this Policy
sections.content: We may update this policy. We will publish the current version on this page, indicating the last update date.
